work_order.title: Emergency Work Order - Gas Leak Response
work_order.situation_summary: Immediate action required due to Grade 1 leak confirmed by multi-signal corroboration.
isolation_protocol: Immediate action required per Grade 1 classification.
Proactive notification of affected occupants/facility and coordination with local fire and emergency services is required due to HCA status.
ppe_required: Notification to local fire and emergency services
Internal gas-control notification for affected facility
proximity_hazards: Segment location has a High Consequence Area (HCA) flag set.
work_order.crew_summary: Response initiated based on Grade 1 classification requiring immediate action.

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Scheduled repair required based on proximity to occupancy.
isolation_protocol: Dispatch crew to the nearest upstream and downstream isolation valves for the affected segment; isolate the segment per the segment's MAOP and valve-spacing record.
Human approval gate: dispatch of field crew for physical isolation requires human confirmation of the recommended action before execution — no autonomous valve isolation (maturity level L3).
ppe_required: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately: no smoking, no electrical switches, no vehicle ignition within the hazard radius.

Evacuate and ventilate any structure where gas has migrated or is suspected to have migrated (paved-capping cases); open doors/windows if safe to do so; do not use powered ventilation equipment that could itself be an ignition source.
proximity_hazards: The leak is Grade 2, justified by proximity to occupied structures (distance to building: 45.0 m).
The confinement type is 'open_row'. The surface capping type is 'soil'.

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order: Gas Leak Monitoring
work_order.situation_summary: Monitoring initiated for a gas leak in Segment SEG-003.
isolation_protocol: Continuous atmosphere monitoring at the leak site and in any structure within the migration radius using intrinsically safe gas detectors until concentration is confirmed below 20% of LEL and trending down. (gas-leak-response-procedures_sec3_0)

Notify emergency services and gas control center immediately; declare a gas emergency per the utility's emergency response plan; target response time is sub-30-minute arrival on site. (gas-leak-response-procedures_sec3_0)
ppe_required: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately: no smoking, no electrical switches, no vehicle ignition within the hazard radius. (gas-leak-response-procedures_sec3_0)
proximity_hazards: Distance to building is 120.0 meters. (INCIDENT PAYLOAD)
The leak is in an open_row with grass surface_capping_type, which implies permeable cover. (INCIDENT PAYLOAD)
work_order.crew_summary: Inspection work to be performed between 2025-06-01 10:07:00+00:00 and 2025-06-01 10:12:00+00:00. (INCIDENT PAYLOAD)

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Immediate response required due to a gas leak.
isolation_protocol: Dispatch crew to the nearest upstream and downstream isolation valves for the affected segment; isolate the segment per the segment's MAOP and valve-spacing record.
Human approval gate: dispatch of field crew for physical isolation requires human confirmation of the recommended action before execution — no autonomous valve isolation (maturity level L3).

Continuous atmosphere monitoring at the leak site and in any structure within the migration radius using intrinsically safe gas detectors until concentration is confirmed below 20% of LEL and trending down.
ppe_required: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately: no smoking, no electrical switches, no vehicle ignition within the hazard radius.

Evacuate and ventilate any structure where gas has migrated or is suspected to have migrated (paved-capping cases); open doors/windows if safe to do so; do not use powered ventilation equipment that could itself be an ignition source.
proximity_hazards: The leak constitutes an immediate hazard due to grading rule: paved capping (concrete) forces lateral migration -> immediate hazard.
Location is in a High Consequence Area (HCA) based on location_class: 3 and hca_flag: True.

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order
work_order.situation_summary: Gas leak detected in segment SEG-005A.
isolation_protocol: Monitor/Re-evaluate based on Grading Rule: unpaved, low concentration, away from occupancy -> monitor/re-evaluate
No immediate Grade 1 response procedure specified as the grading is Grade 3 (MONITOR)
Field crew dispatch for physical isolation requires human confirmation before execution (Procedure Reference: gas-leak-response-procedures_sec3_0)
ppe_required: Continuous atmosphere monitoring at the leak site and in any structure within the migration radius until concentration is confirmed below 20% of LEL and trending down (Procedure Reference: gas-leak-response-procedures_sec3_0)

work_order.title: Emergency Work Order: Gas Leak Response
work_order.situation_summary: Immediate response required due to gas leak detected under paved capping, indicating high migration risk.
isolation_protocol: Eliminate ignition sources in the affected area immediately.

Evacuate and ventilate any structure where gas has migrated or is suspected to have migrated (paved-capping cases); open doors/windows if safe to do so; do not use powered ventilation equipment that could itself be an ignition source.
Establish isolation: dispatch crew to the nearest upstream and downstream isolation valves for the affected segment; isolate the segment per the segment's MAOP and valve-spacing record.

Continuous atmosphere monitoring at the leak site and in any structure within the migration radius using intrinsically safe gas detectors until concentration is confirmed below 20% of LEL and trending down.
Notify emergency services and gas control center immediately; declare a gas emergency per the utility's emergency response plan; target response time is sub-30-minute arrival on site.
work_order.crew_summary: Field crew dispatch required for physical isolation requires human confirmation of the recommended action before execution (Human approval gate) [gas-leak-response-procedures_sec3_0].
